reference: The missed periods that you are experiencing are most likely due to hormonal changes in your body as a result of the fact that you missed your pills for a few days. It is unlikely that you would be pregnant; however, having said that, I would still recommend that you take a home pregnancy test to be sure.
text: The missed periods that you are experiencing are most likely due to hormonal changes in your body as a result of the fact that you missed your pills for a few days. It is unlikely that you would be pregnant. However, having said that, I would still recommend that you take a home pregnancy test to be sure.
